migration_note: Migration 000027 effects confirmed fully in DB. Column display_order exists (default=99), fingerprints backfilled (47/47), dedup complete (0 duplicate titles), impact_score boosted (17 regulatory signals ≥ 70). Applied in prior session via SQL Editor per MEMORY.md notes.

AT1_null_fingerprint_active_90d.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_signals WHERE fingerprint IS NULL AND status = 'active' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'

AT2_null_display_order_enabled_feeds.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM data_feeds WHERE display_order IS NULL AND is_enabled = true

AT3_regulatory_signals_boosted.query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_signals WHERE signal_type = 'regulatory_alert' AND impact_score >= 70 AND status = 'active' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
AT3_regulatory_signals_boosted.note: impact_score is INTEGER in DB; spec threshold 0.8 interpreted as integer 70 (migration applied GREATEST(score, 70) for regulatory signals)

AT4_no_duplicate_titles.query: SELECT COUNT(*) duplicates FROM (SELECT lower(trim(title)), COUNT(*) FROM market_signals WHERE active = true GROUP BY 1 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) d
